changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for clarity and consistency with resource naming conventions
review_notes: The functions generally map well to Kubernetes security controls relevant to PCI DSS 11.4.3, which focuses on security monitoring and threat detection. Audit logging and network policies are appropriate mappings. Naming conventions were mostly followed, but a minor change was made for consistency.
naming_improvements: Ensure resource names are specific, such as using 'apiserver' for audit logging functions
title: Requirement 11.4.3
step1_reasoning: The control 11.4.3 is about enabling security monitoring and threat detection, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring audit logging is enabled and configured to capture necessary metadata. Additionally, admission controllers can be used to enforce security policies, and network policies can restrict ingress traffic to enhance security monitoring.
